objects.name: Medkit
objects.desc: A 3D model of a medkit, made in Blender. Features an olive green body with red crosses on each side with a hinged lid. Use the buttons below the viewer to play the animation, toggle wireframe view, rotate the model, and control the lighting.

objects.name: Compass
objects.desc: A 3D model of a compass, made in Blender. Features a detailed compass body, a compass face, and rotating needle. Use the buttons below the viewer to play the animation, toggle wireframe view, rotate the model, and control the lighting.

objects.name: Flashlight
objects.desc: A 3D model of a survival flashlight, made in Blender. Features a detailed torch body with textured grip, lens cone, and on/off sliding switch. Use the buttons below the viewer to play the animation, toggle wireframe view, rotate the model, and control the lighting.
